name: Chuck Adult Cat Salmon 400g
shortDescription: Well-rounded cat food recipe crafted to nourish bones, skin and muscles while promoting a naturally shiny, healthy coat.
description: Product Highlights Main Ingredient: Contains 35% real salmon, providing high-quality protein essential for muscle maintenance and health. Nutritional Benefits: Loaded with Omega-3 fatty acids, taurine, zinc, and vitamins which promote a shiny coat, heart health, muscle function, and overall vitality. Ingredients: Salmon, meat and animal derivatives, fish oil, vegetable oils, vitamins, and minerals. Ideal for: Adult cats needing balanced nutrition and flavor-rich meals inspired by seafood Usage and Storage Store unopened cans in a cool, dry place. After opening, refrigerate and use within 2 days to maintain freshness and quality. Suitable as a daily meal for adult cats, offering a tasty, moisture-rich option to help hydration.
